title: Show'em the horn!
description: Why is he standing!? Honk the horn!
body:
# Show'em the horn!

This mod will add several types of car horn blocks, and not just cars. When a redstone signal is applied to the blocks, they will emit various signal sounds.

## Strongly recomend to use with [Trackwork](https://modrinth.com/mod/trackwork)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/raxfGfIW9uk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
